top_stories.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
top_stories.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.

secondary_signals.title: Meta’s New AI Asked for My Raw Health Data—and Gave Me Terrible Advice
secondary_signals.summary: Meta’s Muse Spark model offers to analyze users’ health data, including lab results. Beyond the obvious privacy risks, it’s not a capable stand-in for a real doctor.

secondary_signals.title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
secondary_signals.summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?

secondary_signals.title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
secondary_signals.summary: The two tech giants are looking to co-develop custom chips, at a time when demand for CPUs is high due to a growing global shortage.

secondary_signals.title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
secondary_signals.summary: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.
